Cerios feature card — a white, generously-rounded card with a mint-green icon tile, title, and body. Use in content grids.

```jsx
<Card
	icon={<BookIcon />}
	title="Uitgebreid trainingsaanbod"
	body="Van basis tot expert niveau: ontwikkel vaardigheden die je direct toepast."
/>
```

No shadow, 20px radius, 32px padding. The icon tile is a 72px green rounded square.
